_comment: Per-GPU-type acceptance baselines for the bring-up gate (R2). A node is accepted only if EVERY measured metric clears its committed floor. Numbers are conservative reference figures and must be re-measured against the operator's real reference node before production use; they are versioned so regressions are caught against a known reference (mirrors the repo's seal/holdout protocol). Bandwidth in GB/s, TFLOPS for dense matmul at the noted precision, latency in microseconds.

apple_silicon_unified_memory.notes: Apple Silicon uses unified memory and MLX/Metal, not HBM/NVLink/NCCL/RDMA. This node class is useful for local inference and judge-farm work but must not be fake-passed through the GPU acceptance floors.
